text:
John is one of the four cosplayers dressed as a Survey Corps soldier in Attack on Demoncon, the tenth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

John has dark skin and shaved black hair. During the convention he wears the Survey Corps uniform with a white shirt and two fake swords.

Story

Along with Brian, Jemaine and Gin, John attends the Demoncon dressed as a Survey Corps member. They come across a trio of ladies dressed as Colossus Titans and approach them, facing them as they were about to fight.

When one of them is infuriated because Gin touches her buttocks, John watches her transform into a Colossus Titan. Trying to act in character, John, Gin and Brian go to attack her. Brian calls out for him but John is trying to fix his equipment, but he is too slow and gets hit by Lisa before.

When Lisa snaps out of her imagination, John is laying on the floor, holding his belly and wanting to vomit.
